text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Smart Falcon's debut race is finally
here, and she's visibly nervous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having the strength of will to put on
performances that nobody shows up to, she can't
escape the pre-race jitters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assure her she can win any race on dirt, and she
heads to the starting gate with renewed
confidence.
